findings.title: Avoid a second payload_info scan on URMA Get responses
findings.impact: Every successful URMA Get with payload metadata now walks all payload_info entries in HasUrmaTcpFallbackPayload, and FillUrmaBuffer immediately walks the same entries again. For large batched or chunked Get responses this adds avoidable O(n) CPU on the foreground Get path.
findings.fix: Fold fallback detection into the existing FillUrmaBuffer payload_info loop, or have FillUrmaBuffer return/report whether any entry already had part_index data, so the request path scans the response metadata once.
